raw_input.title: Backend Data Pipeline Engineer
raw_input.job_html_or_text: DataNest needs a Backend Data Pipeline Engineer to build Python services, own SQL data pipelines, improve observability, and collaborate with analytics stakeholders.

profile.base_cv_text:
Ignacio Rodriguez
Backend engineer with Python APIs, SQL data workflows, dashboards, observability, stakeholder collaboration, Fiction Express, Talan Consulting, Globant, and Balloon Group.

human_review_notes: Reviewed seed case: materials must be specific to DataNest and pipeline/backend work without turning the profile into a data science background.
